productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Printed Yellow Tops
description: CompositionSunny yellow T-shirt made of 100% viscose, has a wide ribbed neckline, dolman sleeves with a raglan cut on the shoulders, patch pocket on the upper left chest and graphic print on the front FittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryFun and stylish, this sunny yellow T-shirt from united colors of benetton is perfect for casual wear. The dolman sleeves and illustration graphic of the little sailor girl adds to the cute factor of this tee, while the viscose fabric drapes well and accentuates your curves. Team this with white shorts and boat shoes for a great poolside look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
